titleStmt.title: SII 16.156: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 156. (A.R. No. 689 of 1917.) BŌYALA-UPPALŪRU, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated, Śaka 1469 (current), Parābhava, Māgha ba. 3, Monday corresponding to 1547 A.D., February 7.

It registers the grant of their varttanas by the Vipravinōdins Anantayya and Parvatayya, sons of Vallabhayya of the Kāsyapa-gōtra, Kātyāyana-sūtra and Śukla-Yajuś-śākha for the construction of a maṇṭapa in front of the temple of Chennakēśvara at the village Malamīndi-Vuppalūru alias Sōmasamudramu in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma which was the amara of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Timmayadēva-Mahārāju, for the merit of all members of the Vipravinōdin community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayādbhudaya śā
livāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1469 Agu
nēṭi parābhava saṁvatsara māgha ba 3 sō lu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvamahārāya
lu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛ
thivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuN śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara naṁdela tiṁmayadēva mahārājulavāriki
Amarānaku pāliṁcina ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōni ma
lamīṁdi vuppalūriki pratināmamagu sōmasamu
draṁ tūrpuna caṁnakēśvaruniki kāsyapagōtraṁ kātyā
yanasūtraṁ suklayajuśākhāyādhyāyulaIna
vipravinōdi vallabhayagāri komāḷlu Anaṁtaya
gāru paravatayagāru dāravōsi Iccina silāśā
sanaṁ mā kulaṁ vipravinōdulu vallabhaya
komārulu paruvataya nalārayānu
pedakēśavaya Ā kēśavaya komāruṁḍu ci
namaya peddagōviṁdaya komāruṁḍu
gōviṁdayānu maṁtramūrti ba
svayyānu vīru mōdalayina vipra
vinōdulakuvaccē vartanalu A
ṁdariki puṇyaṁgānu ceṁnakēśvaru
ni guḍimuṁdari maṁṭapaṁ
gaṭṭeAṁdulaku Amṛtapaḷa
kugānu trivācakapurassara
mugā Ācaṁdrārka
stāyigānu dāravō
si vēsina silā
śāsanaṁ yī śāsanānaku Ē vipra
vinōdi tappinā tama tallitaṁḍrula
vāraṇāsilō vadhiṁcinavāru
�nukamāṁssaṁ surā sē
viṁcinavāru .
Digital edition of SII 16.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
